title: Craft of the Rings
description:
Craft of the Rings modpack

This modpack brings The  lord of the Rings into Minecraft
body:
🌍 Enter Middle-earth – Craft of the Rings

### note: make sure to check the video before stasrt playing 

To begin your adventure, craft the special item 🛠️ shown in the recipe image.
This item unlocks the gateway into Middle-earth 💍, where the true journey begins.
Explore vast legendary biomes 🏞️ inspired by Tolkien’s world.
Encounter iconic creatures 🐉, allies 🤝, and enemies ⚔️ along the way.
Sail across majestic rivers and seas ⛵ with immersive ship mechanics.
Experience dynamic seasons ❄️🌸☀️🍂 that change gameplay and landscapes.
Enjoy cinematic visuals 🌄 through powerful shaders and performance optimizations ⚡.
Use tools like Xaero’s Minimap 🗺️ to never lose your path.
ℹ️ More details about the Middle-earth map can be found here:
